title: Apostolic Prefecture of Kafiristan and Kashmir
summary:
The Prefecture Apostolic of Kafiristan and Kashmir (Latin: Praefectura Apostolica de Kafiristania et Caspira) was a Roman Catholic missionary division.  It was under the Diocese of Lahore.


== References ==
